name: Tracecat
long_description:
Tracecat is the open source AI automation platform for technical teams. Purpose-built for security, reliability, and internal operations.

We provide everything technical builders need to automate work — AI agents, workflows, cases, and over 150 integrations. Trusted by automation builders (open source and enterprise) across 500+ organizations from startups to Fortune 500 and federal agencies.
one_liner: Automate work with secure AI agents
